curation_notes: The patch commit is a merge commit (7e47d6d) from GHSA-gccq-h3xj-jgvf into the pixelfed staging branch. It modifies 9 source files with no test files. The root cause is twofold: (1) BearerTokenResponse.getExtraParams() hardcodes the scope field to 'read write follow push' regardless of actual granted scopes, and (2) all API controller endpoints only check for user authentication but never verify token scopes via tokenCan(). The patch adds tokenCan() checks to every API endpoint and fixes the scope reporting in the token response. AuthServiceProvider.boot() was also updated to define admin:read and admin:write scopes. Locations derived primarily from the patch diff since the advisory describes the issue at a high level without naming specific files.
